subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-06-30 in Port Said
subcodes.first_line: The Bahá'í Cause is like unto the great ocean, or rather the great ocean is a symbol of the Cause of God. Its mountainous waves are within itself and by itself.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @growth of the Cause, @imagery in the Qur'an, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
